name: Orange Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Confectioners' sugar; up to 3/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all of the ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Add the orange coloring gradually until you achieve the desired shade.
3. Frost after the cake has cooled completely.
NOTE: This frosting is used on the Booze Cake and can be served to children for Halloween parties, as the alcohol cooks out during baking. It results in a very moist cake.
